zh.lifeSummary: 當Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos於大約1132年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞時，他的父親Gutierre Tellez Giron33歲，母親Urraca Diaz23歲。他於1190年之前與Ximena Osorio Fernadez結婚。他於1176年在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞被列為mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile。他去世於大約1193年在他的家鄉享年63歲，埋葬在西班牙。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos于大约1132年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安帕倫希亞时，他的父亲Gutierre Tellez Giron33岁，母亲Urraca Diaz23岁。他于1190年之前与Ximena Osorio Fernadez结婚。他于1176年在西班牙卡斯利亞 拉 維亞被列为mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile。他去世于大约1193年在他的家乡享年63岁，埋葬在西班牙。

nameMeanings.name: Gutiérrez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Jesus, Manuel, Carlos, Francisco, Jorge, Pedro, Raul, Miguel, Roberto.

Spanish (Gutiérrez): patronymic from the medieval personal name Gutierre, from a Visigothic personal name of uncertain form and meaning, perhaps a compound of the elements gunthi ‘battle’ + hairus ‘sword’.

variants.name: Gutierez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Ignacio, Manuel, Adalberto, Ana Maria, Angel, Carlota, Emilio, Exiquio, Felipe, Fermin.
Hispanic (Gutiérez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutirrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guterrez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guiterrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Luis, Arturo, Francisco, Alfredo, Jesus, Rafael, Raul, Carlos, Guadalupe, Jose Luis.
Hispanic (Guitérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Gutierres
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Ramon, Jesus, Juan, Manuel, Alberto, Alfonzo, Alvaro, Ana, Andres, Antelmo, Catalina.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierez
meanings: Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guttierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jesus, Jose, Pablo, Raul, Reina, Adolfo, Beatriz, Carlos, Diego, Evangelina, Felicita, Humberto.
Hispanic: altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

variants.name: Guitierrez
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Enrique, Jaime, Manuel, Miguel, Ofelia, Ricardo, Salvador, Andres, Argentina, Armando.
Hispanic (Guitiérrez): altered form of Spanish Gutiérrez (see Gutierrez ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ceballos
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Luis, Juan, Carlos, Manuel, Francisco, Mario, Sergio, Javier, Jesus, Miguel, Ramon.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Ceballos in Cantabria. Compare   Cevallos  ,   Zeballos  , and   Zevallos  .

variants.name: Ceballo
meanings: Spanish (mainly southern): probably an altered form (singular) of   Ceballos  .

variants.name: Cevallos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Manuel, Pedro, Fernando, Jose, Luis, Eduardo, Francisco, Jaime, Ana, Angel.
Spanish: variant of   Ceballos  .

nameMeanings.name: Rodrigo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Visigothic: composed of the elements hrōd ‘fame’ + rīc ‘power’. It was the name of the last king of the Visigoths, defeated by the Moors in 711 .

en.lifeSummary: When Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos was born about 1132, in Palencia, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Gutierre Tellez Giron, was 33 and his mother, Urraca Diaz, was 23. He married Ximena Osorio Fernadez before 1190. In 1176, at the age of 45, his occupation is listed as mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile in Castilla la Vieja, Spain. He died about 1193, in his hometown, at the age of 63, and was buried in Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos est né environ 1132, à Palencia, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Gutierre Tellez Giron, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Urraca Diaz, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ximena Osorio Fernadez avant 1190. En 1176, à l’âge de 45 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile à Castilla la Vieja, Espagne. Il est décédé environ 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos um 1132 in Palencia, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gutierre Tellez Giron 33 und seine Mutter Urraca Diaz 23. Er hat vor 1190 Ximena Osorio Fernadez geheiratet. 1176, als er 45 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile in Castilla la Vieja, Spanien aufgeführt. Er starb um 1193 im Alter von 63 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Spanien begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos è nato il circa 1132 nel Palencia, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Gutierre Tellez Giron, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Urraca Diaz, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ximena Osorio Fernadez prima del 1190. Nel 1176, all'età di 45 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile nel Castilla la Vieja, Spagna. Morì circa 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Spagna.

ja.Castilla la Vieja, Spain: スペインカスティラ ラ ヴィエジャ

ja.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballosが約1132年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンプアレンシアで生まれた時，父Gutierre Tellez Gironは33歳，母Urraca Diazは23歳であった。1190年以前にXimena Osorio Fernadezと結婚した。1176年，45歳の時，スペインカスティラ ラ ヴィエジャでの職業はmayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castileと記録されている。彼は約1193年に故郷で63歳で死去し，スペインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos(이)가 대략 1132년 스페인 카스틸라 와이 레o 파렌샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gutierre Tellez Giron(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Urraca Diaz(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1190년 이전 Ximena Osorio Fernadez(와)과 결혼했다. 1176년, 45세의 나이로 그의 직업은 스페인 카스틸라 라 비자에서 mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile이었다. 그는 대략 1193년 그의 고향에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 스페인에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1132–about 1193: tany ho any amin'ny 1132–tany ho any amin'ny 1193

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos nasceu aproximadamente 1132, em Palencia, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Gutierre Tellez Giron, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Urraca Diaz, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ximena Osorio Fernadez antes 1190. Em 1176, com 45 anos, sua profissão aparece como mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile em Castilla la Vieja, Espanha. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos родился около 1132 г. в местности пеиленся, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Gutierre Tellez Giron было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Urraca Diaz, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ximena Osorio Fernadez перед 1190 г. В 1176 году, в возрасте 45 лет,  он работал по профессии mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile в местности кастилла ла виеджа, Испания. Он умер около 1193 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности Испания.

sm.about 1132–about 1193: e tusa o le 1132–e tusa o le 1193
sm.desde 1173 hasta 1193: mai le 1173 e o'o I le 1193

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rodrigo Gutiérrez de Ceballos nació aproximadamente 1132, en Palencia, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Gutierre Tellez Giron, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Urraca Diaz, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ximena Osorio Fernadez antes de 1190. En 1176, a la edad de 45 años, su ocupación registrada era mayordomo mayor de alfonso viii de castile en Castilla la Vieja, España. Murió aproximadamente 1193, en su pueblo, a la edad de 63 años, y fue sepultado en España.
